title: THE ONE WHERE RACHEL GOES BACK TO WORK

lines.text: Chandler and Monica's

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Good morning, Tiger! I'm making you a nice big breakfast so you can keep up your strength for tonight. You're gonna get me good and pregnant.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I've got nowhere to go this morning. I'm unemployed! I don't know what I'm gonna do with my life.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, I just lost my erection.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I mean, what am I supposed to do with myself?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're supposed to find your passion in life. You can be whatever you wanna be now. It's exciting.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But it's all so overwhelming. I don't know where to start.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, wait a second. I can help you with this. You just need to be organized. We can make a list of your qualifications, and categorize jobs by industry. There could be folders and files!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! This is where your hyper-organized-pain-in-the-ass stuff pays off!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know!!! My erection is back!
[Opening credits]
Central Perk

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Gunther who comes over with coffee and a muffin) Thank you!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey, can I have a sip of your coffee and a bite of your muffin?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.
Phoebe Thank you. (Pours his coffee in a thermos and puts his muffin in her purse.) Thank you!
Joey:: Pheebs, have you ever been bitten by a hungry Italian?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry, it's just, I'm a little short on cash.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: If you want I could loan you some money?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no, no, no. I learned never to borrow money from friends. No, that's why Richard Dreyfuss and I don't speak anymore.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, hey, how about this? Wanna be an extra on my show?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You could do that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, yeah. The pay is pretty good and you could do it for as long as you need.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my god, I'm gonna be on TV!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, now. I gotta tell you, being on TV isn't as glamorous and exciting as you think.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No it is awesome!
Rachel and Ross enter with Emma

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi guys.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: (Adlib hellos)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow! Hey, why are you all dressed up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rachel and I are bringing Emma to Ralph Lauren today to introduce her to everyone. Doesn't she look cute?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: She sure does. Why does she have a pink bow taped to her head?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, because if one more person says "what a cute little boy" I'm gonna whip them with a car antenna!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think she's gonna be the hit of the office, huh? She's gonna be hotter than peasant blouses and A-line skirts. Can I get a blue bow?
Chandler and Monica's

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Flipping through bunch of folders as Chandler enters from bathroom) Okay, I have looked through a bunch of career guides, photocopied and highlighted key passages and put them into alphabetical folders so you can make an informed decision.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How long was I in there?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. Let us start with the A's. Advertising.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait. Advertising! That's a great idea!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Don't you want to look through the rest?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't think I have to hear the rest. Advertising makes perfect sense. Sorry you had to waste all this time, though.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You call eight hours alone with my label maker wasted time? Ooh, now I get to use my shredder!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I mean, I can write slogans. I mean, how hard can it be, right? "Cheese. It's milk that you chew." "Crackers. Because your cheese needs a buddy." "A grape. Because who can get a water melon in your mouth?"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I got one. "Socks. Because your family's feet deserve the best."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Honey? Leave it to the pros.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I actually know someone in advertising. I grew up with this guy who is a vice president at a big agency. Maybe I can get him to meet you? Give me the phone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: "The phone. Bringing you closer to people...who have phones."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: "Marriage. It's not for everybody."
Ralph Lauren

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That went well. Almost everybody knew that she was a girl.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, after you punched that one guy who got it wrong, word spread.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm just gonna go in my office and pick up some stuff . (To the guy behind her desk) Who the hell are you!?

lines.speaker: Guy
lines.text: Who the hell are you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm the hell person whose office this is!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good one, Rach.

lines.speaker: Guy
lines.text: I'm Gavin Mitchell, the person who's taken over your job.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Oh, your baby's so cute. Why did you put a pink bow on a boy?
DOOL set

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey, look at me! I'm a nurse!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes you are. I think it may be time for my sponge bath. Sorry, I'm just so used to hitting on the extras. So, are you excited about your scene?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! But I'm a little shaky and nervous.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, relax. Don't be. You'll be fine, you'll be fine. They'll probably just make you stand in the back.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Okay, okay, okay! (To Phoebe) You. Here, come here, here. You're gonna take this tray, you're gonna stay on this yellow mark. You're gonna move on "action!" You're gonna walk over to the operating table. You're gonna stop on that blue mark, you're gonna put the tray down. Don't walk too fast! But don't doddle.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, now. What?

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: And...Action!!
Phoebe starts walking toward the operating table. Her hands are shaking like crazy, causing the tray to rattle.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Cut! Cut!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I'm just a little nervous.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Well, don't be.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, that helps.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: And...Action!
Phoebe starts walking towards the table again. She's even more shaky than before and almost drops the tray.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Cut!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, you know what? Don't worry, Pheebs! It usually takes me three takes too! (Off the director's look) Alright, eight.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: And...Action!

Ok, here we go again. Phoebe starts walking toward the operating table, but stops every time the tray starts to rattle. She eventually drops it on the floor, but finishes the scene anyway by putting the now non-existent tray on the table.
Central Perk

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: So, do you have any other question about advertising?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, no. But let me show you what I can do. "Bagels and donuts. Round food for every mood."

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: Monica warned me you might do that. I actually think we might have something for you at the agency.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really? That's great!

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: It's an unpaid internship.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's funny. When you said "unpaid" it sounded like you said "unpaid."

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: Come on now. Monica has a good job. And it's not like you have a family to support.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually, we're trying, and I don't think Monica's gonna wanna postpone it. We're supposed to have sex tonight. Actually, she's probably at home naked right now. I tend to keep talking until somebody stops me. I can just picture her on the bed right now.

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: Stop!

lines.speaker: Interviewer
lines.text: Okay.
Ralph Lauren

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wait a minute! What do you mean, you're taking over my job?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Well, while you were on your baby vacation I was doing your job.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: A vacation? My idea of a vacation does not involve something sucking on my nipples until they are raw.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Clearly you've never been to Sandles Paradise Island.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright! Don't get too comfortable there, because I'm back in two weeks! And I want everything back to the way it was. I can't say that I care too much for the way you've rearranged my office.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: I can't say I care too much for that smell you've brought in with you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rach we have a code brown situation.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Can you please, please take care of it for me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Alright, but you have to do one sometime.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Let me just get this straight! So I go have a baby and they send some guy in to do my job?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Well, there was talk of shutting down Ralph Lauren all together.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's right. You're very cheeky for a temp.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: I'm not a temp. I was transferred here from another department.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah, what department was that? The Jerk department?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Oh, they didn't tell me about your quick wit.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Did they mention that I'm rubber and you're glue?

lines.speaker: Mr. Zelner
lines.text: (Enters) Gavin, Ralph loved your ideas.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, hi Mr. Zelner.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zelner
lines.text: Rachel, I see you've met Gavin. I must say, when you left us we weren't sure what we were gonna do. But then, Gavin to the rescue. Super Gavin!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's great. So now, Super Gavin, when I come back where are you planning on flying off to?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Well, that's up to Mr. Zelner. I'm sure he will make the right decision.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To herself) Oh, wow. Super ass-kissing power.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zelner
lines.text: Incidentally, when are you coming back?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Today.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: You said two weeks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I said today! See, for a superhero, not so much with the listening.
DOOL set

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey. So, what did he say?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, he can be a little rough around the edges, so I'm gonna replace a word he used a lot, with the word "puppy." Okay, so he said: "If your puppy friend doesn't get her puppy act together, I'm gonna fire her mother-puppy ass."

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry, I can't do this. I'm not an actor.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right, you're not. You're a nurse. You're Nurse With Tray.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no. Nurse With Tray doesn't know Joey, she doesn't have time for friends. She gets in that operating room and she carries that tray to the doctor, because if she doesn't, people die!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who dies?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Points to man on operating table) Man With Eye Patch! You get in there and you do your job.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes, doctor.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Okay, let's try this one more time.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hang in there, Man With Eye Patch, your tray is coming!

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: And...Action!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Does the scene) Yes, I did it!!! I nailed it!!! Yay! What's next?

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: The rest of the scene.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, from the top, people!
Ralph Lauren

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Listen. Sudden change of plans. My maternity leave just ended. They told me that if I didn't come back today, they were gonna fire me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? No, that's illegal. I'm gonna have the labor department down her so fast they won't even...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright, alright. Calm down Norma Rae. They didn't actually say that. I'm just afraid if I don't come back right now this guy's gonna try to squeeze me out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What about Emma? We don't have a nanny.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know. You know, we're just gonna have to figure out a plan tonight. Can you please just take care of her for today?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Absolutely. Just give me your breast and we'll be on our way.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Come on, I don't know what else to do.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine, fine. (To Emma) We'll have fun, won't we? Yes, we will, yes we will. (Gives her a kiss, and the pink bow tapes itself to his head.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You're pretty.
Chandler and Monica's

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Whatever I decide to do, I'm gonna be starting a career from scratch. It's gonna be a while before I make a living at it. Maybe now is not the right time to be starting a family.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So you have to tell Monica you don't want to have a baby right now?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Hugs Chandler) Good-bye.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Enters) Okay, it's baby time. Pants off Bing. (Sees Ross) Didn't see you there Geller.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, Ross is here so...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, and I was really hoping that I could hang out. What do you feel like doing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We're gonna have sex.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't feel like having sex. Maybe we can watch a movie or something.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Let me put it this way. We're having sex whether you're here or not.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pants off Bing!
Ralph Lauren

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright. Now that I'm back, why don't you just fill me in on what you've been up to?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Well, I've changed your screensaver from that picture of *Nsync.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, they were popular when I left!

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Also, I've just been working on this big presentation for tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I should be involved in that, so why don't you get me up to speed?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: That's gonna take weeks. Why don't just let me take care of the presentation?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, no no no no. I see what you're doing here, alright, listen, this is my job buddy. Okay, I've had it for five years, and I know how it works, so why don't you just catch me up!

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Fine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Sits down in her chair) Oh god. You've totally messed with the back support of my chair. How do you fix this?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Hey, you've been here five years, you figure it out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Fine, I will. (Pushes that button thing on the chair that makes it "collapse") Alright, fill me in!
Chandler and Monica's

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You have a blue tie that would go with this? Emma spit up on mine.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, yeah. But you have to give it back if I get a job. Of course, by that time in the future ties will be obsolete and we'll all be wearing silver jump suits.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Enters from the bedroom) Hi, good morning lover. I gotta say after last night, I'm a little weak in the knees.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Here's an idea. You walk into a room...take a quick scan!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Ross) Sorry. (To Chandler) But I kind of have this feeling that we may have made a baby last night.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh god, I have to tell you something. You're not pregnant.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That thing that I have to do to make a baby. I faked it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What!? You faked it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know what? I don't need a tie. I mean, it's better, open collar. You know, it's more casual (He leaves.)
DOOL set

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey, listen. I can't do this, it doesn't make any sense. Yesterday I was a nurse, and today I'm a waitress at a cafe?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, sometimes we use the same extras for different parts. It's okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, it's not okay, because I gave a very memorable performance as the nurse. And now suddenly I'm the waitress? That's gonna confuse my fans.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Maybe you are a nurse, but you moonlight as a waitress.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uhuh. Because I'm a single mother, supporting my two children.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nice.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wait a minute. Dr. Drake Ramoray and I work at the same hospital. Wouldn't I come over to say hi to him?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no. See, you and Drake are having a fight.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He slept with you and then never called you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And I just wanted a new daddy for Davy and Becky.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Okay, okay, from the top. And...Action!

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: So, I'm surprised you agreed to have lunch with me.

lines.speaker: Joey/Drake
lines.text: I'm surprised to, but yet here I am.
Phoebe walks by and slaps him.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Cut, cut! What are you doing!?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, well, I'm very angry at him, because he slept with me and never called me back.

lines.speaker: Extra
lines.text: Me too!

lines.speaker: Another extra
lines.text: Me too!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, calm down! She means on the show! We need some new extras around here!
Chandler and Monica's

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: (Enters) Wow, you're here already.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes. Emma and I came in a little early to do research on the presentation. I actually made a few changes, but I think I'm caught up on everything. So ask me anything!

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: How do you fix the chair?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Except that! (Mr. Zelner enters) Oh, hello, Mr. Zelner. We're all ready for our presentation this afternoon.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zelner
lines.text: Good, because it's in ten minutes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? I can't do that! I have the baby, and Ross is not gonna pick her up for another hour.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zelner
lines.text: Well, then Gavin can give the presentation, okay, we have to do it now. Ralph needs to leave early today. He's going helicopter shopping.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, there you go. You win, you win. You get to do the presentation, you'll knock 'em dead, no one will ever remember that I worked here, and then Ralph will buy his helicopter, and Super Gavin will just fly right along side of him!

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: You can do the presentation.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I can't, I have a baby.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: I'll watch her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why would you do that?

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: Because you've worked really hard, and it's your job, and you're a little crazy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's really nice.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: I should tell you that crying women make me very uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Then you're not gonna like what's coming. (Starts crying) I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry. Thank you, thank you.

lines.speaker: Gavin
lines.text: I'm really fine, don't worry, I'm great with children. (To Emma) Gavin Mitchell. Pleased to meet you.
DOOL set

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Please don't fire my friend. Just let me talk to her.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Okay, okay. But this is her last chance.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you, thank you. How about I do something for you? Tomorrow, I'll bring you a hat, cover up the bald?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, listen Pheebs. I was just talking to the director, and he was thinking, maybe this time you don't hit Drake, you just wait on the tables?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can't do that. I'm an actor. I have a process.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You're a masseuse. You have a table with a hole in it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wait a minute, I see what's happening here. You're threatened.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I'm so good in this scene that I'm stealing focus from you. Well, rise to the challenge Tribianni 'cause I just raised the bar. Come join me up here!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To the director) Yeah, you can fire her, but I would call security, she won't go easy.
Chandler and Monica's

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You faked it? You couldn't have faked it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yes you can. You just make the faces and the noises.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Guys can fake it? Unbelievable. The one thing that's ours! Besides, why would you fake it when we're trying to have a baby?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's actually why. Look, I'm starting a whole new career now, and I'm not saying that I don't want to have a baby, I'm just saying maybe we could wait a little while.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Like a month?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Or a year?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really, you want to wait a year?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It could be less than a year. I mean, you've heard my stuff. "Pants. Like shorts, but longer." (Pause) It'll probably be more than a year.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I really wanna have a baby.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, me too. Look, I'll just get my old job back.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I want you to have a job that you love. Not statistical analysis and data reconfiguration.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I quit and you learn what I do?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's just, I think, there's never gonna be a right time to have a baby. I mean, now you're unemployed and in a little while you'll find a new job that'll keep you really busy. There's always gonna be a reason not to do this, but I think once the baby comes, forget about all those reasons.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I guess. It's always gonna be scary when we have a baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's gonna be really scary. I mean, god. When we have a baby, there's gonna be so much that we're not able to control. I mean, the apartment's gonna be a mess, I won't have time to clean it. What if the baby gets into the ribbon drawer? Messes up all the ribbons?! What if there's no room for a ribbon drawer, because the baby's stuff takes up all the space!? Where will all the ribbons go!?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Should we go make a baby right now before you change your mind?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes, please!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, and I promise, I will not fake it this time.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wish I could say the same. I'm a little shook up!
[Closing credits]
DOOL set

lines.speaker: Joey/Drake
lines.text: I know you botched that operation on purpose. I can't prove it yet, but when I do, you'll be going to jail for murder. I don't care if you are my brother.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: I'm not your brother.

lines.speaker: Phoebe/Waitress
lines.text: What about my children Drake?! Huh!? (She starts running around on the set with a security guy chasing her) No!! No!! No! God!
